channel.title: Comments on: Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Chris
item.dc:creator: Chris
item.description: Just stumbled on your site, got some great information on beer. I'm going to have to go get some of that IPA.
item.content:encoded: Just stumbled on your site, got some great information on beer. I’m going to have to go get some of that IPA.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Yes you guys look pretty spiffy in those racing shirts ;-) I really enjoy listening to the business side of craft brewing.
Keep showing, I'll keep watching. Cheers, Marco
item.content:encoded:
Yes you guys look pretty spiffy in those racing shirts 😉
I really enjoy listening to the business side of craft brewing.

Keep showing, I’ll keep watching.
Cheers,
Marco
